questionHtml: Hence, determine the total amount Ruben will save, to the nearest ZAR, by making the higher monthly payments.
markschemeHtml:
51 × 4600 + 706.80                    (M1)

235306.80

attempt to find difference between their value and their part (b)                    (M1)

239097 - 235306.80

3790 ZAR

Note: Do not penalize for not rounding to nearest rand if this has already been penalized in part (b).

[3 marks]

meta.title: Hence, determine the total amount Ruben will save, to the nearest ZAR, by making the higher monthly payments.
